contract_scope: Row shape of a live /api/auth/login session and the user envelope the server emits across /api/auth/* + /api/conversations/* owner gates. Opaque bearer session ids (32-char hex) persisted in SQLite with TTL and revocation. Closes readiness tracker AB.2.
honesty_rules: password_hash is NEVER included in the user envelope the server emits. Auth responses strip it at serialization time.
revoked_at replaces expires_at for lookup purposes — a row with revoked_at NOT NULL fails validation regardless of expires_at.
A disabled user (status='disabled') fails session validation even on sessions issued while the user was active. Demo scope: re-enabling the user does NOT resurrect the prior sessions.
The user envelope is the same shape everywhere auth appears: /api/auth/login, /api/auth/whoami, conversation `meta.user_ref` rehydration (#A-4), WS handshake context (#A-5).
